name: IGB Eletronica S.A.
summary: IGB Eletronica S.A. engages in leasing and managing industrial warehouses in Brazil. It also operates in the solar energy market. The company was formerly known as Gradiente Eletronica S.A. and changed its name to IGB Eletronica S.A. in February 2010. IGB Eletronica S.A. was founded in 1964 and is based in Manaus, Brazil.
